name: Chocolate Ice Milk 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over water and let stand 1 minute.
2. Microwave on high for 30 seconds, then cool to room temperature.
3. Combine 3/4 cup milk with the gelatin mixture and remaining ingredients.
4. Beat at medium speed until foamy, about 3 minutes.
5. Stir in the remaining milk.
6. Pour into a shallow metal pan and freeze until almost set, 20 to 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Transfer to a bowl and beat on high until thick and light colored, about 5 minutes.
8. Pour into a container and freeze until firm, about 8 hours.
9. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes to soften.
Makes 10 servings. Calories per half cup: 72.
